title: T-014 — POST /api/scheduler/assignments/:id/approve
prompt:
# T-014 — POST /api/scheduler/assignments/:id/approve

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §8.2 approve, §9.3 business rules, §15.4 V-SCHED-07
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement approve endpoint that flips scheduler_assignments.status='approved', updates work_orders fields atomically, and emits scheduler.assignment.approved outbox event.

## Implementation contract
1. Route `apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/assignments/[assignmentId]/approve/route.ts`: POST body { user_id, notes? }.
2. Single transaction: UPDATE scheduler_assignments SET status='approved', approved_by, approved_at; UPDATE work_orders SET planned_start_time, assigned_line_id, assigned_shift_id; INSERT outbox_events.
3. RBAC V-SCHED-07: Planner Advanced or Scheduling Officer only; 403 otherwise.
4. Conflict guard: 409 if assignment.status != 'draft'.

## Files
- apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/assignments/[assignmentId]/approve/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/lib/scheduler/approve-action.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/assignments/[assignmentId]/approve/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a draft assignment + Planner role, when POST runs, then assignment.status='approved', work_orders updated, outbox_events row inserted (all in one transaction)
2. Given an already-approved assignment, when POST runs again, then 409 returned
3. Given role 'Operator', when POST runs, then 403 returned

## Test strategy
- RED: write __tests__/route.test.ts asserting transactional update + outbox emit + 409 + 403
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test scheduler/assignments/approve'

## Risk red lines
- Do not split the work_orders update + outbox emit across separate transactions (must be atomic)
- Do not bypass V-SCHED-07 RBAC
- Do not delete the original draft state (status flip preserves audit trail)

pipeline_inputs.description: Approve assignment: status flip + work_orders update + outbox event in one transaction with RBAC + conflict guard.
pipeline_inputs.details: Single Drizzle transaction wraps three writes: assignment status update, work_orders fields update (planned_start_time, assigned_line_id, assigned_shift_id), and outbox_events row (scheduler.assignment.approved). RBAC enforces V-SCHED-07 (Planner Advanced or Scheduling Officer). 409 if assignment not in 'draft' state.
out_of_scope: Do not implement bulk approve here (T-017)
Do not consume outbox event here (08-PROD owns consumption)

Given an already-approved assignment, when POST runs again, then 409 returned
Given role 'Operator', when POST runs, then 403 returned
test_strategy: RED: write __tests__/route.test.ts asserting transactional atomicity + outbox emit + 409 + 403
